title: Floral Tender Kenyan Olives Salad
description: A fragrant, post-workout salad that blends blanched black olives with fresh herbs, almond crunch and edible flowers for a floral twist.
instructions: 1. Bring a small pot of salted water to a boil. Add the black olives and blanch for 1 minute.
2. Drain the olives and immediately transfer them to a bowl of ice water to stop cooking. Let them cool for 2 minutes, then drain again and pat dry.
3. In a large bowl, combine the blanched olives, spinach, sliced onion, mint, basil, and edible flowers.
4. Whisk together lemon zest, lemon juice, olive oil, honey, salt, and pepper to make a dressing.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently until everything is evenly coated.
6. Sprinkle toasted sliced almonds on top for crunch.
7. Serve immediately, or chill for 10 minutes to meld flavors.
8. Optional: add a light sprinkle of grated Parmesan or feta for extra protein.
9. Enjoy as a refreshing, protein‑rich post‑workout meal.
